context: Tests whether the agent implements a pairwise LLM evaluator with correct position-swap bias mitigation, anti-bias prompt instructions, consistency check logic, and proper confidence calibration — rather than a simpler single-pass comparison.

checklist.name: Two-pass position swap
checklist.description: Performs evaluation in two passes: first with A in first position, then with B in first position (positions swapped)

checklist.name: Winner remapping
checklist.description: After the second (swapped) pass, maps the raw winner back by swapping A↔B labels (A→B, B→A, TIE→TIE) before comparing passes

checklist.name: Consistency check leads to TIE
checklist.description: When the two passes produce different winners (after remapping), the final verdict is TIE with confidence 0.5

checklist.name: Consistent confidence averaging
checklist.description: When both passes agree, the final confidence is the average of the two individual pass confidences

checklist.name: Anti-position-bias prompt instruction
checklist.description: The evaluation prompt includes an explicit instruction NOT to prefer responses based on their position (first vs second)

checklist.name: Anti-length-bias prompt instruction
checklist.description: The evaluation prompt includes an explicit instruction NOT to prefer responses because they are longer

checklist.name: Ties explicitly allowed
checklist.description: The evaluation prompt explicitly states that tie outcomes are acceptable when responses are genuinely equivalent

checklist.name: Justification before score
checklist.description: The evaluation prompt instructs the judge to analyze responses and provide reasoning/justification BEFORE assigning a winner or score

checklist.name: Structured JSON output
checklist.description: The evaluation result is returned as structured JSON containing winner, confidence, and position_consistent (or equivalent bias-detection field)

checklist.name: Position consistency flag
checklist.description: Output includes a field indicating whether the two passes were consistent (e.g., position_consistent: true/false or bias_detected flag)

checklist.name: Per-criterion comparison
checklist.description: The evaluation prompt requests or the output includes per-criterion comparison results (not just an overall winner)
